⇄

InternetMerge

Stopped
Note: This bonds links by spreading connections across them, so total throughput rises with many parallel transfers. A single download is not faster, and there is no speed gain if both links share the same upstream router/ISP — use links on different networks (e.g. Wi-Fi + phone USB tethering).

1. Choose links to bond

Loading interfaces…

2. Options

Route system traffic through proxy
Sets the OS SOCKS proxy (macOS network services, Windows WinINET, or GNOME on Linux) — restored on stop.
…

Auto-bond selects every ready link and routes your system through the proxy automatically (restored on Stop).

Total ↑0 B/s

Not running.
